FireRed/LeafGreen Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	As usual, in FireRed/LeafGreen you battle your way through 8 gyms, each specializing in a particular type. Following that you take on the Elite Four and the Champion.

The teams are mostly the same as the original Red/Blue with a few level changes. The levels of the Elite Four's Pokémon also increase from the second challenge onward.

### Gym Leaders
[Brock](#gym-1) (Pewter City)[Misty](#gym-2) (Cerulean City)[Lt. Surge](#gym-3) (Vermilion City)[Erika](#gym-4) (Celadon City)[Koga](#gym-5) (Fuchsia City)[Sabrina](#gym-6) (Saffron City)[Blaine](#gym-7) (Cinnabar Island)[Giovanni](#gym-8) (Viridian City)
### Elite Four
[Lorelei](#elite4-1)[Bruno](#elite4-2)[Agatha](#elite4-3)[Lance](#elite4-4)[Blue](#champion-5)
